_meta.role: Player character sheet — the living authority for every tracked value about Bill: attributes, skills, cultivation/abilities, gear, ammunition, money, banked cores/captures, and NPC warmth (relationships).
_meta.current_to: SESSION 30 IN PROGRESS — Day 28, on Floor 1 of the Ashen Descent (the Smoldering Wastes). Carries the S29-close state; the S30 change reflected here is ammo (7 hellfire rounds fired). S30 deltas NOT yet folded in (await S30 close per gm_operations.md close-out): the bound core named 'Ember' and the bond a step deeper; mana gently ticked. Phase-1 migration reconciliation (this pass): absorbed the facts campaign_state.md held that the JSON lacked — the Pem money line, the firm's recurring income, the patent portfolio, the old charm, the delve notebook, bench odds/documents — and added the relationships scaffold. Phase-2 (this pass): the relationships block is populated with the full recurring roster, paired to the npcs/ files.

identity.open_fork: Collapse to his true name as a later play, on his own word; Calloway has the path ready.

active_conversion.note: sighted-tuned; his ceiling far above Julie's ~75% blind cap; tuning past 63% remains

suppression_weave.doctrine: keep the leak as cover; the old charm is an external aid, default OFF (the charm is carried — see gear_and_inventory.carried_special)

intrinsics.name: Deep Inspection
intrinsics.note: deep structural reach + clean resolve; reads aspect/rarity, weaves, essence-structure, made-stock, faults; out-resolves a western licensed read; reads across distance at heavier draw; reading a person stays surface (interior reads [Owner-private]); heavy reps incl. the live sight-share — flag a level at next class beat. Renders as terse plates (READ FORMAT, Day 26). Detectability: a wide/passive read sits unfelt even to an expert; a focused probe pointed at the man is felt (READ DETECTABILITY, measured off Pearce Day 26).

intrinsics.name: Schematic
intrinsics.note: keeps studied mechanisms and weaves as recallable, refinable internal drawings

seated_universal_skills.name: Steadyhand
seated_universal_skills.note: his one universal Passive seat; always-on, no upkeep; stills hand-tremor, aids fine hand-work

seated_universal_skills.name: Alchemy
seated_universal_skills.note: NEW S29; Crafting Table boon expansion; reagents, elixirs, coatings, material-transmutation; distinct from mundane Alchemy/Chemistry 4

seated_universal_skills.name: Spirit Gun
seated_universal_skills.note: launched orb, brief flight-hold, detonate-on-arrival; crude/short at Lv.1

maker_core.status: BOUND (S29) — a bonded familiar, first of its kind
maker_core.self_handle: the one who holds the fire so it doesn't burn the others
maker_core.name_pending_fold: named 'Ember' in S30 (in the SavePoint); folds in at S30 close
maker_core.nature: old (older than the dungeons), wise about the dungeon's machinery, a who; communion is feeling/picture/intention, no words yet
functions: hellfire refinery -> portable hellfire anywhere with ambient fire
keeps essence-conduits open under fire; drinks essence-sources dry (deep self-growing well)
shares Bill's sight down the bond (force-multiplier)
holds drink-captures (the Colossus's pattern lives in its well)

declined: Path I — seat the essence-conduit grammar clean
Path II — the sighted-draw/filter/drain efficiency leap

health: HEALTHY. No wounds, no conditions. Mana bottomed, recovering.

structured_loan_remittance.note: Malcolm's separate 5,000 loan; first landed Day 17; ~6 parcels remaining; nothing new Days 18-26. Arrival schedule is tracked in living_world_truth_v1.md; this line is the balance fact.

quest_account_mercantile.note: +25/mo retainer; parts at cost; settle monthly. (Reconciliation flag: a tie-off folded this retainer into the firm's ledger conceptually; kept as its own line here pending a Phase-3 ledger decision.)

firm_treasury.note: Min owes the delivered/paid lines + the firm's 1 cr/tin cut; at/past self-sustaining. Tin-count question still out to Min via Eli — answer pending.

pem.note: two items, DO NOT COMPRESS: the converted loot-share [standing]; the Compact [pending]

gunsmith_standing_supply.note: 'my shelf, your cash' PLUS a 500-cr retainer / first-call on his wheel

money.income_doctrine: My hands, my coin — cert, instrument bodies, gunsmith-grade work pay Bill's pocket; the firm earns off the young ones' work. In the partnership: firm income splits 50/50 with Pearce, but Bill's outside personal handwork stays his own. The speedloader and the coilgun half-commission sit on this line.

patents.status: HELD — four filing-ready designs; to be co-owned under Quest Instruments and filed fast via the East-end channel (both names, Pearce's on top) once the articles are signed on Bill's return
patents.excluded: the coil gun is NOT in the portfolio and never will be

weapons.name: Coil gun (new, S29)
weapons.note: frame-metal body, hellfire-worked by the bound core; aspected grain-matched throat (kills the mana-wear clock); bond-seam (reads what Bill reads, core can lend draw — entangling/untested under fire); 10-round magazine; silent; runs off Bill's core/the bond. NOT in the patent portfolio.

weapons.note: top-break, six chambers; ~175 loaded cartridges + home reserve; speedloader proven; a patent candidate

coil_gun.magazine: 10-round; feeds standard darts and hellfire rounds

relationships._scale: 1-100 warmth toward Bill; bands + movement/ceiling/visibility rules in game_bible.md. Bill never sees the number — he reads it from behavior. Movement surfaces via the change-tag (gm_operations.md §4). Read the band off the number; do not store the band. Qualitative texture and voice for each NPC live in npcs/.
relationships._status: PHASE-2 — populated from the campaign_state NPC section and the npcs/ files. Values are openers; they move in play per the change-tag and the close ledger. Dormant/one-off NPCs are added when they re-enter play and earn a file.
